mapper.select: SELECT WS.SERVICE_ID, WS.CARID_NO, WS.CAR_NO, WS.COMPANY_ID, TC.COMPANY_NM, TO_CHAR(WS.REQUEST_DT, 'YYYYMMDD') AS REQUEST_DT, WS.PROC_ST FROM TR_WONBU_SCRAP WS, TM_COMPANY TC WHERE WS.COMPANY_ID = TC.COMPANY_ID(+) AND WS.REQUEST_DT BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{START_DT} || '00:00:00', 'YYYYMMDDHH24:MI:SS') AND TO_DATE(#{END_DT} || '23:59:59', 'YYYYMMDDHH24:MI:SS') ORDER BY WS.REQUEST_DT DESC

SELECT CZ.CARID_NO, CZ.CAR_NM, CZ.CARZEN_CD, TO_CHAR(CZ.REG_DT, 'YYYYMMDD') AS REG_DT FROM TM_CARZEN_MAPPING CZ WHERE 1=1
AND CZ.CARID_NO LIKE '%' || #{CARID_NO} || '%'
ORDER BY CZ.REG_DT DESC

SELECT IM.CAR_NO, IM.INSURER_NM, TO_CHAR(IM.INS_SDT, 'YYYYMMDD') AS INS_SDT, TO_CHAR(IM.INS_EDT, 'YYYYMMDD') AS INS_EDT, IM.INS_ST FROM TM_INSURANCE_MANAGE IM WHERE 1=1
AND IM.CAR_NO LIKE '%' || #{CAR_NO} || '%'
ORDER BY IM.INS_SDT DESC
